---
format:
  html
title-block-banner-color: "#ffffff"
listing:
  - id: workshops-listing
    type: table
    contents: "../workshops/*.qmd"
    fields: [ID, module, title , file-modified]
    sort:
      - ID
    date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: [Module, Number, title]

---

<a href='https://esqlabs.com/'><img src='../resources/esqlabs.png' style='max-width:100%'></a>

# ESQlabs R Trainings

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple" icon="false"}
## PAGE 2026 — Pre-conference Workshop · 1 June 2026 · Dubrovnik

**R Workflows for advanced PB-QSP Modeling with `{ospsuite}` and `{esqlabsR}`**

Full-day instructor-led workshop. See the [agenda + day-of deck](../agendas/R_Workshop.qmd) and the [cheatsheet](../agendas/R_Workshop_cheatsheet.qmd).
:::


# 📊 Workshops

::: {#workshops-listing}
:::

# 📦 Environment

Slides on this site were rendered with the following versions:

```{r versions, echo=FALSE}
pkgs <- c("ospsuite", "ospsuite.parameteridentification", "esqlabsR")
knitr::kable(
  data.frame(
    Component = c(
      paste0("R (", R.version$nickname, ")"),
      paste0("`{", pkgs, "}`")
    ),
    Version = c(
      as.character(getRversion()),
      vapply(
        pkgs,
        function(p) as.character(utils::packageVersion(p)),
        character(1)
      )
    )
  )
)
```
